name: Marvo GT-84

knownBehavior.input: works in some games and DS4-like modes
knownBehavior.rumble: reported to work over USB in some cases; Bluetooth support unknown
knownBehavior.lightbar: reported to work dynamically over USB in some games; Bluetooth support unknown
knownBehavior.internalSpeaker: hardware advertised, PC protocol support unconfirmed
knownBehavior.headsetJack: hardware advertised, PC protocol support unconfirmed

notes: Do not assume this controller fully implements the DualShock 4 protocol.
The first PadScope target is to collect VID/PID and HID report data from a real unit.
Audio support may require DS4-style HID audio reports; if firmware does not implement them, software cannot force support.
evidenceNeeded: Bluetooth VID/PID or device instance path
Windows sound endpoint screenshot or enumeration output
